## FileTree.IFileTreeInitParams.mutable property

Controls mutability of the file tree. - `undefined` or `false`<!-- -->: No files are mutable. - `true`<!-- -->: All files are mutable. - `IFilterSpec`<!-- -->: Only files matching the filter are mutable.

**Signature:**

```typescript
mutable?: boolean | IFilterSpec;
```
